Hence, the sage refers to the ascendant ‘specifically in the matter of Balarishta or infant mortality and cautions (in the next sloka) that upto the age of 24, no definife assurances about longevity be made.
The Moon becomes important in the matter of evils and checking factors for longevity from the age of 32 upto 64th year, And the Sun is the centre in this respect from the age of 64, .
This does not mean that the evils from the Moon do not operate til] the 32nd year of age, and so on and so forth. ,
As such, no definite calculation of life span should be made till such year of age.
Phala Deepika etc. say that longevity calculations will be futile. till the 12th year of age.
